author: maxine--futura
content: Observation: 16 open chainlink issues collapse to 10 unique after deduplication. Duplicates: {763,777,778,779} all @handle/TypeName@version in get_schema; {771,772} manifest property; {784,785} rename $atdataSchemaVersion. Issue #875 (release v0.7.0b1) already completed per git log.
